title: Mugget's Pukeko
description: Makes chickens into the cute New Zealand bird, a pukeko.
body:
This pack makes chickens become the cute New Zealand animal, a Pukeko. 

It includes:

- Seperate models and textures for babies and adults
- Thats about it.

*Changes the American English (en_us) language file to rename chickens and the chicken food item to become "Pukeko"*

﻿For a more cursed standalone version of this pack, including only the baby Pukeko model and textures click here.

**This pack needs EMF/ETF (recommended) or OptiFine to work**
